metadata.name: Manage Truck Queue during Peak Hours

description: During a busy period, the truck queue outside the gate is getting long. The gate manager must take action to speed up processing.

nodes.task_description: Monitor the gate camera feeds and queue length data.

expected_outcome.value: Manager observes that the queue is extending into a public road, which is a safety concern.

nodes.task_description: Open additional gate lanes to increase throughput.

expected_outcome.value: The manager opens two more available gate lanes.

nodes.task_description: Communicate with yard operations to ensure there are enough internal vehicles to service the faster gate flow.

expected_outcome.value: The manager coordinates with the yard to ensure container handling equipment can keep up with the increased truck volume.
